role: Source code directory of the ArchSpine mirror system containing all core modules and supporting assets.
responsibility: Provides the complete implementation of the ArchSpine system, including AST parsing, CLI interface, core orchestration, scanning engines, infrastructure services, service pipelines, task execution, type definitions, and shared utilities, collectively enabling code analysis, architectural enforcement, and mirror synchronization.

children.role: Central template assets for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing reusable foundational documentation, prompt engineering components, configuration standards, and public API surface documentation.
AST parsing and language discovery module for code analysis.
Command-line interface layer for the ArchSpine semantic mirror system, handling user interaction, argument parsing, command routing, and output formatting.
Core contracts and runtime orchestration module for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Core engine module providing scanning, context resolution, rule enforcement, and reporting capabilities for the ArchSpine mirror system.

Provides the core infrastructure layer for the ArchSpine mirror system, including configuration management, database operations, LLM integration, credential storage, file system manifest, MCP server, and prompt assembly.
Service orchestration layer that coordinates core operations for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Core pipeline execution tasks for the ArchSpine mirror system.
This directory contains the core type definitions and data contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining shared interfaces for data model, configuration, and infrastructure.
Shared utility modules providing common infrastructure for the ArchSpine CLI and core operations.
